006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
024
025/**
026 * Mixin that wires JSP view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
027 *
028 * <p>
029 * Compose into a host resource via
030 * {@link Rest#mixins() @Rest(mixins=JspMixin.class)}; the host then:
031 *
032 * <ol class='spaced-list'>
033 *    <li>Gains a default mount at {@code /jsp/*} that serves raw {@code .jsp} resources from the
034 *       importer's classpath via
035 *       {@link jakarta.servlet.RequestDispatcher#forward forward(...)}.
036 *    <li>Picks up {@link JspViewRenderer} automatically via the mixin's
037 *       {@link Rest#responseProcessors() @Rest(responseProcessors=...)} declaration, so
038 *       {@code @RestOp}-method return values of type {@link JspView} render through the JSP
039 *       engine without any additional wiring.
040 * </ol>
041 *
042 * <h5 class='figure'>Composition example (microservice):</h5>
043 *
044 * <p class='bjava'>
045 *    <ja>@Rest</ja>(path=<js>"/app"</js>, mixins=JspMixin.<jk>class</jk>)
046 *    <jk>public class</jk> AppResource <jk>extends</jk> RestServlet {
047 *
048 *       <ja>@Bean</ja> JspMixin jsp() {
049 *          <jk>return</jk> JspMixin.<jsm>create</jsm>()
050 *             .basePath(<js>"/WEB-INF/views/"</js>)
051 *             .build();
052 *       }
053 *
054 *       <ja>@RestGet</ja>(<js>"/hello/{name}"</js>)
055 *       <jk>public</jk> View hello(<ja>@Path</ja> String <jv>name</jv>) {
056 *          <jk>return</jk> JspView.<jsm>of</jsm>(<js>"hello.jsp"</js>).attr(<js>"name"</js>, <jv>name</jv>);
057 *       }
058 *    }
059 * </p>
060 *
061 * <h5 class='section'>Configurable mount path:</h5>
062 *
063 * <p>
064 * The default mount {@code /jsp/*} can be overridden via the SVL variable
065 * {@code ${juneau.jsp.path:jsp}} &mdash; set via system property
066 * ({@code -Djuneau.jsp.path=views}), environment variable
067 * ({@code JUNEAU_JSP_PATH=views}), or {@code Config} key
068 * ({@code juneau.jsp.path = views}) to change the runtime mount without subclassing.
069 * Resolution happens once at {@link RestContext} construction time (SVL resolution in {@code @RestOp(path)}).
070 *
071 * <p>
072 * Override accepts bare token ({@code jsp}), leading slash ({@code /jsp}), trailing slash
073 * ({@code jsp/}), or wildcard suffix ({@code /jsp/*}) &mdash; all resolve to the same mount.
074 *
075 * <h5 class='section'>Mixin-only deployment:</h5>
076 *
077 * <p>
078 * This resource is designed for composition via {@code @Rest(mixins=...)}. The mount path is
079 * pinned at the op level by {@link RestGet @RestGet(path="/&#123;juneau.jsp.path:jsp&#125;/*")} on
080 * {@link #render}; a class-level {@code @Rest(paths=...)} declaration would be silently
081 * ignored under the mixin pattern (see {@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} Javadoc).
082 *
083 * <h5 class='section'>Engine-agnostic packaging:</h5>
084 *
085 * <p>
086 * The {@code juneau-rest-server-view-jsp} module ships <b>only</b> the JSP API + JSTL impl in
087 * {@code provided} scope. <b>No JSP engine</b> is bundled with the bridge module. Consumers add
088 * the engine matching their container:
089 *
090 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
091 *    <li><b>Jetty 12 EE11</b> (microservice-jetty, Spring Boot embedded Jetty):
092 *       {@code org.eclipse.jetty.ee11:jetty-ee11-apache-jsp}.
093 *    <li><b>Embedded Tomcat</b> (Spring Boot default):
094 *       {@code org.apache.tomcat.embed:tomcat-embed-jasper}.
095 *    <li><b>External-WAR</b> deployments: container-supplied; no additional dependency.
096 * </ul>
097 *
098 * <p>
099 * When no engine is on the classpath, the renderer surfaces
100 * {@link JspViewRenderer#NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC} naming the missing dependency.
101 *
102 * <h5 class='section'>Spring Boot fat-jar caveat:</h5>
103 *
104 * <p>
105 * Spring Boot's repackaged fat jar does not place {@code .jsp} files where the embedded JSP
106 * engine looks by default. Place JSP resources under
107 * {@code src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/WEB-INF/views/...} (the {@code META-INF/resources/}
108 * prefix is the Servlet 3.0 convention Spring Boot honors for embedded servlets). Both
109 * {@code mvn spring-boot:run} and the deployed jar pick the files up this way.
110 *
111 * <h5 class='section'>Multiple base paths:</h5>
112 *
113 * <p>
114 * A host with {@code /views/} JSPs and {@code /admin/views/} JSPs registers two
115 * {@code JspMixin} beans, each mounted via a subclass declaring its own op-level
116 * {@code @RestGet(path=...)} override and its own {@code basePath}. See the
117 * {@code JspMixin_MultiBasePath_Test} test in {@code juneau-integration-tests} for the canonical
118 * pattern.
119 *
120 * <h5 class='section'>OpenAPI surface:</h5>
121 *
122 * <p>
123 * The greedy {@code /*} handler is not API-meaningful and is excluded from generated
124 * Swagger / OpenAPI specs via {@link OpSwagger#ignore() @OpSwagger(ignore=true)}.
125 *
126 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
127 *    <li class='jc'>{@link JspView}
128 *    <li class='jc'>{@link JspViewRenderer}
129 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JspViewSupport">JSP View Support</a>
130 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerComposition">REST Server &mdash; Mixins and Multi-Mount Paths</a>
131 * </ul>
132 *
133 * @since 10.0.0
134 */
135// @formatter:off
136@Rest(
137   responseProcessors={JspViewRenderer.class}
138)
139public class JspMixin {
140
141   /** Default base path applied when no {@link Builder#basePath(String)} call has been made. */
142   public static final String DEFAULT_BASE_PATH = JspDispatcher.DEFAULT_BASE_PATH;
143
144   private final JspDispatcher worker;
145
146   /**
147    * Creates a new builder.
148    *
149    * @return A new builder.
150    */
151   public static Builder create() {
152      return new Builder();
153   }
154
155   /**
156    * No-arg constructor &mdash; uses {@link #DEFAULT_BASE_PATH} as the base path.
157    *
158    * <p>
159    * The mixin walk falls back to this constructor when the {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore
160    * BeanStore} does not have a registered {@code JspMixin} bean.
161    */
162   public JspMixin() {
163      this(create());
164   }
165
166   /**
167    * Builder constructor.
168    *
169    * @param builder The builder. Must not be {@code null}.
170    */
171   protected JspMixin(Builder builder) {
172      worker = builder.worker.build();
173   }
174
175   /**
176    * Returns the base path under which {@code .jsp} resources are resolved.
177    *
178    * <p>
179    * Read by {@link JspViewRenderer} when dispatching a {@link JspView}-typed return value, and
180    * by the {@link #render render(...)} handler when forwarding raw-{@code .jsp} requests under
181    * {@code /jsp/*}.
182    *
183    * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
184    */
185   public String getBasePath() {
186      return worker.getBasePath();
187   }
188
189   /**
190    * [GET /jsp/*] &mdash; forward the request to the JSP engine.
191    *
192    * <p>
193    * The {@code @Path("/*") String path} captures the multi-segment trailing remainder (e.g. a
194    * request for {@code /jsp/admin/dashboard.jsp} matches the mount with
195    * {@code path = "admin/dashboard.jsp"}). Delegates to the shared {@link JspDispatcher} worker,
196    * which dispatches via {@code ServletContext.getRequestDispatcher(basePath + path).forward(...)}
197    * so the container's JSP engine renders the template.
198    *
199    * <p>
200    * Missing JSP resources surface as a 404 from the underlying container; missing JSP engine
201    * surfaces as {@link JspViewRenderer#NO_ENGINE_DIAGNOSTIC}.
202    *
203    * @param path The trailing path segment after {@code /jsp/} (the JSP file name relative to
204    *    the configured {@link #getBasePath() base path}).
205    * @param req The current REST request.
206    * @param res The current REST response.
207    * @throws IOException If the underlying servlet writer fails.
208    * @throws NotFound If the JSP resource cannot be resolved.
209    */
210   @RestGet(
211      path="/#{pathToken(${juneau.jsp.path:jsp})}/*",
212      summary="JSP view",
213      description="Forward a request to the JSP engine for a raw .jsp resource under the configured base path.",
214      swagger=@OpSwagger(ignore=true)
215   )
216   public void render(@Path("/*") String path, RestRequest req, RestResponse res) throws IOException, NotFound {
217      worker.render(path, req, res);
218   }
219
220   /**
221    * Builder for {@link JspMixin}.
222    *
223    * <p>
224    * Mirrors {@link JspDispatcher.Builder}'s configuration methods on its own surface and forwards
225    * each call into a held {@link JspDispatcher.Builder} (§2.3.1 worker-bean composition).
226    */
227   public static class Builder {
228
229      private final JspDispatcher.Builder worker = JspDispatcher.create();
230
231      /** Constructor &mdash; package access for {@link JspMixin#create()}. */
232      protected Builder() {}
233
234      /**
235       * Sets the classpath / webapp base path under which {@code .jsp} resources are resolved.
236       *
237       * <p>
238       * Defaults to {@link JspMixin#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH "/"}. A typical configured value
239       * is {@code "/WEB-INF/views/"} &mdash; the Servlet-spec convention for hiding template
240       * files from direct HTTP access.
241       *
242       * @param value The base path. {@code null} or blank values reset to the default
243       *    {@link JspMixin#DEFAULT_BASE_PATH}.
244       * @return This object.
245       */
246      public Builder basePath(String value) {
247         worker.basePath(value);
248         return this;
249      }
250
251      /**
252       * Reads the current base path setting (test/inspection helper).
253       *
254       * @return The base path. Never {@code null}.
255       */
256      public String getBasePath() {
257         return worker.getBasePath();
258      }
259
260      /**
261       * Builds the {@link JspMixin}.
262       *
263       * @return A new {@link JspMixin} instance.
264       */
265      public JspMixin build() {
266         return new JspMixin(this);
267      }
268   }
269}
